name: Christmas Morning Wife Saver
recipeIngredient: 16 slice Back bacon or ham; cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9 X 13" buttered baking dish (use a large dish), place 8 pieces of bread.
2. Add the remaining 8 pieces of bread to cover the dish entirely.
3. Cover the bread with cooked back bacon or ham slices.
4. Lay slices of cheddar cheese on top, then cover with more bread slices (to make it like a sandwich).
5. In a bowl, beat together eggs, salt, and pepper.
6. To the egg mixture, add dry mustard, onion, green pepper, Worcestershire sauce, milk, and Tabasco.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the sandwiches.
8. Cover and let stand in the fridge overnight.
9. In the morning, preheat the oven to 350°F.
10. Melt 1/4 lb butter and pour it evenly over the top.
11. Sprinkle crushed corn flakes or Special K cereal on top.
12. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F.
13. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
